=== hello_world
# Simple text render: game writes a string at the top-left.
mode: text
width: 20
height: 5
player_id: alice
--- js
var Game = {
    init: function(s) {},
    render: function(buf, playerID, x, y, w, h) {
        buf.writeString(0, 0, "Hello, " + playerID + "!", null, null);
    }
};
---
===
╔══════════════════╗
║Hello, alice!     ║
║                  ║
║                  ║
╚══════════════════╝

=== fill_row
# Game fills the entire first row with dashes.
mode: text
width: 20
height: 3
--- js
var Game = {
    init: function(s) {},
    render: function(buf, playerID, x, y, w, h) {
        var row = "";
        for (var i = 0; i < w; i++) row += "-";
        buf.writeString(0, 0, row, null, null);
    }
};
---
===
╔══════════════════╗
║------------------║
╚══════════════════╝

=== multiline
# Game writes on multiple rows.
mode: text
width: 20
height: 5
--- js
var Game = {
    init: function(s) {},
    render: function(buf, playerID, x, y, w, h) {
        buf.writeString(0, 0, "Row 0", null, null);
        buf.writeString(0, 1, "Row 1", null, null);
        buf.writeString(0, 2, "Row 2", null, null);
    }
};
---
===
╔══════════════════╗
║Row 0             ║
║Row 1             ║
║Row 2             ║
╚══════════════════╝
